idea_text: Privacy-safe client call summary tool for independent consultants

report.idea_text: Privacy-safe client call summary tool for independent consultants
report.executive_summary: Independent consultants show meeting follow-up pain and WTP, but privacy and client trust objections must shape positioning.

evidence.title: Client call follow-ups take hours
evidence.summary: Direct pain: independent consultants spend hours turning client calls into follow-up notes and actions.
evidence.quote: After every call I lose an hour turning notes into a client-safe recap.

evidence.title: Client confidentiality makes AI note tools risky
evidence.summary: Objection: consultants worry generic AI meeting tools create privacy and trust risk with client data.
evidence.quote: I cannot paste sensitive client calls into a generic AI tool without trust controls.
evidence.icp_segment: independent consultants managing sensitive client calls

wtp_evidence.title: Consultant would pay for privacy-safe summaries
wtp_evidence.summary: Direct WTP: consultant would pay $39/mo for privacy-safe client call summaries if trust controls are clear.
wtp_evidence.quote: I would pay $39/month if privacy controls were obvious.
wtp_evidence.icp_segment: independent consultants managing sensitive client calls

competitor_complaints.title: Generic meeting AI lacks client trust controls
competitor_complaints.summary: Competitor complaint: generic meeting AI tools summarize calls but lack consultant-specific client trust and privacy positioning.

direct_competitors.name: MeetingNotesAI
direct_competitors.gap: Summaries without consultant-specific privacy and client trust framing.
